features: Vaseline Gluta-Hya Flawless Tone Serum Burst Lotion fights dark spots
Our Serum Burst lotion is boosted with GlutaGlow** technology, with Antioxidants 10x more powerful than vitamin C*
Made with Hyaluron, active Glycerol and Vaseline Jelly, this body moisturiser locks in deep¹ moisture and boosts your skin’s natural radiance
Our unique, fast-absorbing serum lotion formula bursts into water droplets, leaving behind a soft, velvety feel
Clinically proven to reduce the appearance of dark spots, the moisturiser delivers more even-toned skin in 5 days while providing expert body care
Apply the lotion twice a day all over your body to fight dullness and reveal dewy, bright skin
description: Product Description Achieve an even-toned glow with Vaseline Gluta-Hya Flawless Tone Serum Burst Lotion. Its unique formula is powered by GlutaGlow™** technology, with Antioxidants 10x more powerful than vitamin C*, to fight dullness for dewy, bright skin. Our body lotion is also made with Hyaluron, active Glycerol and Vaseline Jelly to hydrate the skin and lock in deep¹ moisture for a healthier-looking glow. This lightweight moisturiser is clinically proven to reduce the appearance of dark spots and deliver more even-toned skin in just 5 days. Our unique formula is designed to burst into water droplets upon application, absorbing instantly and leaving behind a soft, velvety feel. How to use: Apply Vaseline Gluta-Hya Flawless Tone Serum Burst Lotion all over your body after showering. For best results, use twice a day. Enjoy a visible even-toned glow. Our skin is the barrier between our bodies and the outside world, and its health is essential to our overall well-being. At Vaseline, we believe that protected, healthy skin is a right, not a privilege. Your journey to beautiful, healthy skin starts here. *In vitro test. Gluta-Hya antioxidant ingredients have been shown to have a 10x stronger antioxidant performance than vitamin C. **GlutaGlow™ is trademarked. ¹Within the stratum corneum. Ingredients Aqua, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Dimethicone, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Undecane, Parfum, Methylparaben, Tridecane, Propylparaben, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Disodium EDTA, Coco-Glucoside, Glycine, Cystine, Potassium Hydroxide, Sodium PCA, BHT, Petrolatum, Citric Acid, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glutathione, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Geraniol, Geranyl Acetate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Terpineol. Safety Warning WARNING. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water.. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs.. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
